channel.title: Image on Hazed Visions Games
channel.description: Recent content in Image on Hazed Visions Games

item.title: Frontier: isometric turn-based strategy game (WIP)
item.description: Just define the image URL in the content’s front matter, the featured image will be displayed as the background. For example: ---images:-https://picsum.photos/1024/768/?random---This is an array, you can set multiple urls, only the first url will be used. These images is also used in Twitter Cards and the Open Graph metadata.

item.title: Geocompute: prototyper for geometric computations (WIP)
item.description: Just define the image URL in the content’s front matter, the featured image will be displayed as the background. For example: ---images:-https://picsum.photos/1024/768/?random---This is an array, you can set multiple urls, only the first url will be used. These images is also used in Twitter Cards and the Open Graph metadata.

item.title: Integer-based 2D CSG
item.description: Just define the image URL in the content’s front matter, the featured image will be displayed as the background. For example: ---images:-https://picsum.photos/1024/768/?random---This is an array, you can set multiple urls, only the first url will be used. These images is also used in Twitter Cards and the Open Graph metadata.

item.title: Integer-based 2D CSG
item.description: Just define the image URL in the content’s front matter, the featured image will be displayed as the background. For example: ---images:-https://picsum.photos/1024/768/?random---This is an array, you can set multiple urls, only the first url will be used. These images is also used in Twitter Cards and the Open Graph metadata.

item.title: FreeFT: isometric action game engine
item.description: FreeFT is an open-source, real-time, isometric action game engine. inspired by Fallout Tactics, a game from 2001 created by an Australian company, Micro Forte. It requires assets from this game, so to run the demos you have to own Fallout Tactics. TODO: filmiki z vimeo TODO: screenshoty ---images:---This is an array, you can set multiple urls, only the first url will be used. These images is also used in Twitter Cards and the Open Graph metadata.

item.title: Snail: real-time raytracer
item.description: FreeFT is an open-source, real-time, isometric action game engine. inspired by Fallout Tactics, a game from 2001 created by an Australian company, Micro Forte. It requires assets from this game, so to run the demos you have to own Fallout Tactics. Hugo uses the excellent Go html/template library for its template engine. It is an extremely lightweight engine that provides a very small amount of logic. In our experience that it is just the right amount of logic to be able to create a good static website.
